1: And judge me by thy strength.
2: Give ear to the words of my mouth.
3: And oppressors seek after my soul: They have not set God before them. Selah. Selah.
4: The Lord is is with them that uphold my soul.
5: Cut them off in thy truth.
6: I will praise thy name, O LORD LORD ; for it is it is good.
7: And mine eye hath seen his desire his desire upon mine enemies.
